news.t: Smaller companies are rising quickly to challenge Big Tech as AI 's best trade

holdings.infoBox: RCTR is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 5.70%, Talen Energy at 5.60%, GE Vernova at 5.22%, Rolls-Royce Holdings at 5.20%, and Vistra at 4.70%.

overview.description: The First Trust Bloomberg Nuclear Power ETF (RCTR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Nuclear Power index. The fund tracks a narrow index of companies whose revenue exposure is tied to nuclear-related activities. Stocks of these companies are selected and weighted based on a combined score of revenue tied to the theme and market-cap RCTR was launched on Aug 30, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Smaller companies are rising quickly to challenge Big Tech as AI 's best trade
data.text: Reliable power, including nuclear, data-center efficiency, and grid capacity are now core drivers of returns from stocks outside of the tech sector benefitting from the AI boom as demand ramps. Invest...
